posts.author: KatjaKokosin (Katja Kokosin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I am looking to use a pre-fill feature on forms. However, currently, this is only achieved using static URLs. Meaning, I have to manually add required information to the URL. This, in my situation, doesn’t work as the pre-fill value is different every time the form is sent out. On top of that the form is issued as part of an automation process and I don’t manually issue the forms myself.

What are you trying to achieve

What I’d like to achieve is for dynamic creation of form URLs with column values as parameters through automations.
Example; every time an item is created on a board, pre-fill option on a form auto populates desired columns, which will always have different values. Each item is essentially a project and when the form is issued the fields should auto populate with the name of the project, client’s name etc, so it would only work if URLs are dynamic.
